holdings.infoBox: RSPN is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are Delta Air Lines stock at 1.69%, Comfort Systems USA at 1.66%, Caterpillar at 1.64%, United Rentals at 1.64%, and Cummins at 1.57%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Industrials ETF (RSPN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of industrial US stocks drawn from the S&P 500. RSPN was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
